creator: shamaz.mazum@gmail.com
text:
Hi. I use sway + mesa 21.1.8 + FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p5 on a computer with AMD Radeon RX 500 series card (don't remember which one it is). After upgrading wlroots to 0.15.0 fullscreen OpenGL applications show random pixels on the screen, but Vulkan applications (like vkquake) work fine.

No error is produced to the console. I think this may have impact on other people who use wlroots-based compositors with AMD cards. Any ideas how to debug this?
